Archive Overview

This compact fixture represents a cleaned source document without relying on Google availability.

Early Records

Record line 01. The fixture is deliberately long enough to prove bounded reader scrolling.

Field Reports

Target section. Contents navigation should move the document reader here without moving the page.

Wendover Note

A nested heading lets the shared contents hierarchy and focus controls initialise normally.
